vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Actuation: Motor pod/pusher prop mount dummy with bolt pattern and cooling path (non-operational)
Structural integrity: Reinforce wing spars and maintain equipment bay door access
Thermal management: Provide cooling inlet for motor pod
Serviceability: Ensure easy access for maintenance and inspection
Interfaces: Define structural and service interfaces with adjacent subsystems

verify.rule: Check that all required fields in the schema are present and non-empty
Ensure the estimated mass matches the design requirements

verify.value: All features are mapped to geometry operations

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at spar attachment flange due to insufficient material thickness
risk.mit: Increase material thickness or add reinforcing ribs

risk.desc: Risk of cooling inlet obstruction if debris accumulates
risk.mit: Add a debris filter or regular cleaning protocol

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance at bay door hinge mount may impede smooth operation
risk.mit: Adjust dimensions to ensure proper clearance

risk.desc: Threaded connections may loosen over time due to vibration
risk.mit: Apply threadlocker or increase preload torque

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate airflow through cooling inlet affecting motor performance
risk.mit: Optimize cooling inlet design or add auxiliary cooling fans

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Structures: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Evidence features: spar_socket, main_spar, anti_rotation_key, rib, carry_through, frame
Datum visibility: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled.
Clearance named: Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances.
Interface count: Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums.
Standard fit vocabulary: Fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance.
Standard hardware dimensioning: Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes.
Spar datum access: Spar socket, anti-rotation keys, and center datum remain visible and inspectable.
Mission payload non-weapon boundary: Payload bay is labeled non-weapon/display-only with removable mission/sensor module.
CG battery service: Battery bay uses slide rail, CG marks, and independent payload/battery removal.
Load path continuity: Lift, landing, and payload loads trace through continuous structure.

verify.rule: part_tree/geometry_ops includes all required evidence_features
cad_brief.mass_est_g <= verification_focus.mass.value
Each part_tree child has corresponding geometry_ops
Adjacent interfaces have matching connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, required_feature
Critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex geometry
risk.mit: Implement additional alignment features and visual aids

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion affecting structural integrity
risk.mit: Use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance on moving interfaces may cause binding
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearances on all moving interfaces

risk.desc: Potential for load path discontinuity if ribs are not properly attached
risk.mit: Ensure ribs are securely fastened with appropriate preload

risk.desc: Risk of damage during service access due to sharp edges
risk.mit: Add chamfers or rounded edges to service access areas

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers lift and landing loads from wing skin to fuselage frames
Provides structural continuity between battery bay and payload bay
Dissipates heat generated by sun exposure through wing structure

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit

verify.rule: All specified elements in the engineering micro-pack are included.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to direct sunlight.
risk.mit: Implement thermal insulation or cooling mechanisms.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if load path continuity is compromised.
risk.mit: Ensure continuous structural members and fittings at every load transfer point.

risk.desc: Battery bay may obstruct CG adjustment if not properly designed.
risk.mit: Use independent battery and payload compartments with slide rails.

risk.desc: Motion claims without corresponding geometric evidence could lead to design flaws.
risk.mit: Include pivot holes, gear teeth dummies, cam profiles, or linkage bars for motion claims.

risk.desc: Inadequate service access could hinder maintenance and inspection.
risk.mit: Ensure clear access points for all critical components.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing planform, airfoil section evidence, winglets, elevon/control surface cutouts with hinges

physics_paths.description: Structural load path from wing ribs to fuselage frames via spars.
Airflow over the wing rib set during flight.
Thermal management from sun exposure to wing skin.

verification_focus.description: Ensure the total mass of the wing rib set does not exceed 150 grams.
Verify structural integrity under simulated flight conditions.
Check for thermal stability under direct sunlight.

risk.desc: Potential thermal management issues due to insufficient cooling for camera pod.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling system or optimize passive cooling design.
